code:
import io
import string

fn abs_int(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has_best = false
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  mut token = ""

  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut b = 0
    if not is_end
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    end

    let is_ws = is_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          let a = abs_int(v)
          if not has_best or a < best_abs
            has_best = true
            best = v
            best_abs = a
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println("min_abs=#{best}")
end
